decisions.decision: Bug report docx: dual donut charts (priority + status) side by side in 2-col layout table, matching BugReportPage UI
decisions.rationale: User requested docx match page visual — donut charts are main visual on BugReportPage

decisions.decision: Sprint docx: card table per sprint (NOT donut charts) — user explicitly rejected charts for sprint
decisions.rationale: User said 'no need donut chart, should be card of each sprints' — sprint page shows card rows not charts

decisions.decision: Sprint card colors: dark green header (#1b4332), state-specific badge bg, tinted severity cells, colored stat values
decisions.rationale: User requested color in table to match page's visual style

decisions.decision: _set_cell_bg uses tcPr + w:shd XML element for cell background — python-docx has no native API
decisions.rationale: Standard python-docx XML manipulation pattern for cell shading

next_action: Restart backend, then UAT both docx exports (bug report + sprint). If charts fail to render, check matplotlib Agg backend is active.
context_notes: Session 4 of post-phase UI polish. All 5 phases complete. This session: rewrote both docx exports to match page visuals. Bug report gets dual matplotlib donuts + stats table. Sprint gets colored card tables (no charts). One bug encountered and fixed: stray tblPr.append line leaked from _remove_table_borders into _set_cell_bg during edit — caused NameError on export. jira_sprint_service.py shows modified — pre-existing, not from this session.
